study: Posture Detection App current external result
reported_metrics: ANN acc=79.316%; precision=94.599%; recall=65.985%; F1=77.743%; best threshold F1=79.903%; rule acc=56.629%; McNemar p=2.19314e-60
comparison_note: Same project scope; still frame-level and needs video-wise/person-wise validation.

study: Estrada, Vea, and Devaraj - Modelling Proper and Improper Sitting Posture...
task: Proper/improper sitting posture in work-from-home setting
reported_metrics: Left/right camera accuracy=85.18%/92.07%; kappa=0.691/0.838; category best left elbow=98.003%; category best right wrist=99.5425%
verification_level: indexed official MDPI page and SSRN abstract
comparison_note: Closest camera/MediaPipe comparison but different camera setup and annotation protocol.

study: Kulikajevas, Maskeliunas, and Damasevicius - Detection of sitting posture using hierarchical image composition and deep learning
method: Deep recurrent hierarchical network based on MobileNetV2
reported_metrics: Headline base-posture accuracy=91.47% at 10 fps; sensitivity=0.9185; specificity=0.9595; F-score=0.9132; kappa=0.8081; fine six-label accuracy=68.33%
comparison_note: Strong vision baseline but uses RGB-D and hierarchy rather than webcam landmarks only.

study: Tsai, Chu, and Lee - An Automated Sitting Posture Recognition System Utilizing Pressure Sensors
reported_metrics: SVM=99.18%; KNN=98.86%; decision tree=97.83%; random forest=98.41%; logistic regression=98.19%; validation involved 20 participants and 12000 samples
comparison_note: High accuracy but sensor-based and controlled.

study: Luna-Perejon et al. - IoT Device for Sitting Posture Classification Using Artificial Neural Networks
reported_metrics: Best ANN accuracy=81.00%; specificity=96.40%; precision=82.14%; sensitivity=80.96%; F1=80.24%; AUC=0.9672
comparison_note: Metric range similar to ours but physical sensor modality and multi-class labels.

study: Feradov, Markova, and Ganchev - Automated Detection of Improper Sitting Postures...
reported_metrics: Highest reported table value=98.4% with linear SVM on arm-sensor AMC features; SVM classifier mean on arm table=94.0%

study: Chaikhamwang et al. - An Intelligent Platform for Behavior Modification and Office Syndrome Risk Reduction...
task: Office syndrome platform with posture/eye-distance/sitting-duration monitoring
method: Real-time detection and behavior feedback platform
reported_metrics: Eye-distance accuracy=95.2%; long-sitting alerts=92.5%; proximity alerts=90.1%
comparison_note: System-level alert comparison; useful for TPRI/logging discussion.

study: ALIGN: An AI-Driven IoT Framework for Real-Time Sitting Posture Detection
input_modality: MediaPipe pose landmarks and video stream
task: Binary correct/incorrect posture on IoT/single-board-computer setup
verification_level: indexed official MDPI page; full extraction blocked
comparison_note: Very close conceptually but must verify full text before final claim.

study: Nadeem et al. - Sitting Posture Recognition Systems: Comprehensive Literature Review and Analysis
task: Systematic review of sitting posture recognition systems
reported_metrics: Selected 120 articles: 70 journal articles, 49 conference proceedings, 1 book chapter
